title: Charred Syrian Barbeque Sauce Kebabs
description: A festive and flavorful dish featuring charred vegetable kebabs smothered in sweet and tangy Syrian barbeque sauce. This low-fat-friendly recipe is perfect for a family dinner or a weeknight meal.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Thread the chicken and vegetables onto skewers, leaving some space between each piece.
Oil the grill grates and cook the kebabs for 8-10 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the vegetables are lightly charred.
Transfer the kebabs to a plate and brush with barbeque sauce.
Let the kebabs rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Meanwhile, prepare an ice bath by filling a large bowl with ice and water.
After the kebabs have rested, immediately submerge them in the ice bath to stop the cooking process and help lock in the flavors.
Once chilled, remove the kebabs from the ice bath and serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
